Keweenaw is a mineral and land management company located in Ironwood, Michigan. Keweenaw has land holdings of
over 1.3 million acres of mineral rights, located predominantly in the western Upper Peninsula of Michigan and northern
Wisconsin. Of these assets, the Company currently holds a lease, option, and royalty agreement on 36,705 acres.
